elements.text: Great changes in my hometown More than twenty years ago, my hometown was just a small, old and pot town. Most of people were farmers. There were fow factories. The people dish't have enough ford to eat and ware old clothes. They had a hard life. Great changes have taken place in the past twenty years. The people have found a lot of ways of making money. Now there are many tall buildings. They are very beautiful. Reads are wide and clean. People can take buses of doive their town cars to go to work. Many people have cell phones and personal computers. People's living conditions have improved a lot. Thanks to the government's efforts. My hometown is becoming more and more beautstul.
